Secure Information Sharing for UK Government

Monkton ISE is a no-code platform that enables UK Government agencies to build secure, accredited information sharing applications - without writing a single line of code. Trusted at the highest classification levels.

Explore the Platform → Request a Briefing
The Challenge

Legacy systems weren't built for modern information sharing.

Current information sharing across FVEY partners is fragmented, too slow for real-time operations, and limited by interoperability barriers.

Fragmented Systems

Data siloed across systems, domains, and classification levels.

Too Slow

Traditional systems take months to update. Missions can't wait.

Interoperability Gaps

Policy, trust, and technical barriers hinder cross-agency collaboration.

Manual Processes

Dependent on siloed architectures and manual workflows.

The Solution

Build mission apps without disruption.

Monkton ISE is a true no-code SaaS platform. Extend your existing infrastructure, create custom workflows, and put delivery back in the hands of your team — all without vendor dependencies.

Days, Not Months

Configure and deploy workflows in days. Make changes yourself without waiting on vendors.

True No-Code

Build custom mission apps without writing code. Your team stays in control.

Above SECRET Compliant

Existing authority to operate with FIPS 140-3 and Common Criteria validation for the highest classification levels.

Monkton Information Sharing Environment

Nine integrated modules that transform how government agencies create, share, and act on information — all through a secure, no-code platform specifically designed for FVEY and NATO policies and standards.

One Platform. Nine Modules.

ISE combines everything your agency needs for secure information sharing into a single, configurable environment.

Apps

No-code creation of mission-tailored web apps with dynamic workflows and data views. Drag-and-drop configuration lets mission owners create purpose-built tools.

Indicators

Identifies emerging threats and patterns to enable early warning and situational awareness. Configurable triggers notify the right people when conditions change.

Login

Multi-factor authentication and role-based access controls for enterprise access to resources. Secure identity management across classification levels.

Social

Secure collaboration around events of interest. Build trusted networks across organisational boundaries with full audit trails and access controls.

Transit

Secure data movement and integration between systems and classifications. Managed data pipelines that maintain security controls across boundaries.

Security

Hardened, mobile-first interface with FIPS 140-3 and CPA validated access to records and auditable inter-agency sharing across all Five Eyes and NATO environments.

Analytics

Interactive visual dashboards and reports based on mission requirements. Real-time visibility into trends, incidents, and key indicators.

Chat

Secure messaging and ad-hoc videoconferencing for operational teams. Purpose-built communication within your security boundary.

Intelligence

Enhanced analytics that transform data into insights, providing real-time visibility into trends, incidents, and key indicators. Supports AI-driven anomaly detection and operational decision-making at speed.

Procuring Monkton ISE for Your Agency

Multiple procurement routes available. Whether you use G-Cloud, departmental frameworks, or direct engagement — we make it straightforward to get started.

How to Procure

Monkton ISE is available through several approved procurement routes, giving your commercial team flexibility.

Primary Route

G-Cloud Framework

Listed on the Digital Marketplace under G-Cloud, primarily under Lot 3 (Cloud Support). Lot 1 and Lot 2 listings for SECRET+ classified services pending under G-Cloud 15.

  • Search "Monkton" on the Digital Marketplace
  • Call-off contract — streamlined procurement
  • Lot 3: Cloud Support (live now)
  • Lot 1 & 2: pending G-Cloud 15 approval
Alternative Routes

Other Frameworks

Depending on your department or agency, other procurement frameworks may be more appropriate.

  • DOS (Digital Outcomes and Specialists)
  • CCS Technology Products & Services
  • MOD-specific frameworks
  • DASA innovation programmes
Direct Route

Direct Engagement

For bespoke requirements, pilot programmes, or exploratory conversations, engage with us directly.

  • Discovery workshops and proof-of-concept
  • Tailored pricing for your use case
  • Technical architecture review
  • Accreditation support from day one

Security & Compliance

Built to meet the rigorous security requirements of UK Government, with international certifications that enable coalition operations.

FIPS 140-3 & CPA

Validated cryptographic modules with Common Product Assurance. All data encrypted at rest and in transit using government-approved algorithms.

Common Criteria

Independently evaluated security functionality. Supports your accreditation process with documented evidence packages.

FVEY & NATO Ready

Deployed across FVEY and NATO environments. Supports multi-national information sharing with security controls and releasability markings.

UK Data Sovereignty

Cloud hosting on UK sovereign infrastructure. UK GDPR compliant data handling with full audit trails.

Cyber Essentials Plus

Certified under the Cyber Essentials Plus scheme, demonstrating robust cyber security controls across our platform.

Above SECRET

Designed to operate at and above SECRET classification. Meets stringent security requirements trusted by government and defence sectors globally.

Purpose-built for your mission.

Defence & Intelligence

Operational information sharing across commands, units, UKIC, and coalition partners.

MODUKICDIO

Home Office & Law Enforcement

Cross-agency information sharing for national security, border security, and law enforcement.

Home OfficeNCABorder Force

Coalition & Industry

Multi-national information sharing and secure supply chain collaboration across the defence community.

Secure Solutions for Those Who Protect

Monkton builds technology that makes privacy, security, and compliance accessible to every organisation — from the battlefield to the boardroom.

Trusted by governments since 2008.

Monkton is a cloud managed services provider delivering pre-vetted security and compliance solutions for the Five Eyes community, NATO member nations, and partners. From emerging cyber threats and cross-domain intelligence to delivering mobile apps at the tactical edge of the battlefield — we transform these complexities into hardened, mobile-first architectures that empower organisations to capture and share mission-critical data in real time across coalition environments.

Monkton Group UK Ltd brings that same battle-tested capability to the United Kingdom.

17+
Years delivering secure platforms to government
5
Major programmes deployed across US & UK government
FVEY
Compliant across Five Eyes & NATO environments
SECRET+
Designed to operate at and above SECRET classification

Battle-tested across real-world missions.

ISE has been deployed across multiple government programmes since 2008, supporting national security operations at the highest classification levels.

Proven across critical domains.

ISE has been operationalised across a wide range of government missions, each with unique security, compliance, and operational demands. Detailed briefings on specific programmes and deployments are available upon request.

Defence & Intelligence

Cross-domain operations at the highest classification levels

Health & CBRNE

Threat detection, patient care, and pandemic response

Law Enforcement

Coalition Operations

Multi-national information sharing across FVEY and NATO

Tactical C4ISR

Command, control, and communications at the operational edge

Border & Homeland Security
